name: GlobalTech Corp
summary: GlobalTech Corporation is a Nevada-based holding company operating telecommunications businesses in Pakistan through consolidated subsidiaries, including a 55% owned subsidiary WorldCALL Public's Long Distance & International network (LDI). The company provides broadband, fiber (FTTH), VOIP, DPLC, and related telecommunications services. It operates under licenses regulated by the Pakistan Telecommunications Authority (PTA) and trades on U.S. markets under ticker GLTK.

products.name: FTTH (Fiber to the Home)
products.description: Broadband internet service delivered via optical fiber directly to individual buildings.

products.name: DPLC (Domestic Private Lease Circuits)
products.description: Private, point-to-point connections between two locations within Pakistan with exclusive bandwidth.

products.name: VOIP
products.description: Voice over internet protocol telecommunications service.

products.name: LDI Network
products.description: Long Distance & International network services operated through 55% owned subsidiary WorldCALL Public.
